resx.TbAllowInsecureCertFetchTips: Only for fetching self-signed certificates. This may expose you to MITM risks.
resx.TbAutoSort: Domain, IP, process are auto-sorted when saving
resx.TbBlockSVCBHTTPSQueriesTips: Block ECH and HTTP/3 availability checks when enabled
resx.TbBootstrapDNSTips: Resolve DNS server domains, requires IP
resx.TbCertPinningTips:
Pinned certificate (fill in either one)
When specified, the certificate will be pinned, and "Allow Insecure" will be disabled.

The "Get Certificate" action may fail if a self-signed certificate is used or if the system contains an untrusted or malicious CA.
resx.TbCustomDNSEnabledPageInvalid: Custom DNS Enabled, This Page's Settings Invalid
resx.TbDirectResolveStrategyTips: If unset or "AsIs", DNS resolution uses the system DNS; otherwise, the internal DNS module is used.
resx.TbDNSHostsConfig: DNS Hosts: ("domain1 ip1 ip2" per line)
resx.TbDnsObjectDoc: Please fill in DNS Object; Click to view documentation
resx.TbDnsSingboxObjectDoc: Please fill in DNS Structure, Click to view the document
resx.TbDomesticDNSTips: By default, invoked only during routing for resolution
resx.TbFakeIPTips: Applies globally by default, with built-in FakeIP filtering (sing-box only).
resx.TbFullConfigTemplateDesc: This feature is intended for advanced users and those with special requirements. Once enabled, it will ignore the Core's basic settings, DNS settings, and routing settings. You must ensure that the system proxy port, traffic statistics, and other related configurations are set correctly — everything will be configured by you.
resx.TbGlobalHotkeySettingTip: Set directly by pressing the keyboard; takes effect after restart
resx.TbPolicyGroupSubChildTip: Auto add filtered configuration from subscription groups
resx.TbPorts7Tips: Will cover the port, separate with commas (,)
resx.TbRayFullConfigTemplateDesc: Add Outbound Config Only, routing.balancers and routing.rules.outboundTag, Click to view the document
resx.TbRemoteDNSTips: By default, invoked only during routing for resolution; ensure the remote server can reach this DNS
resx.TbRemoteResolveStrategyTips: If unset or "AsIs", DNS resolution is performed by the remote server's DNS; otherwise, the internal DNS module is used.
resx.TbRoutingInboundTagTips: tun: TUN inbound, socks: local port, socks2: second local port, socks3: LAN port
resx.TbRoutingTips: *Separate rules by commas (,); For a literal comma use <COMMA>; Prefix # to ignore a rule
resx.TbRuleMatchingTips: (Domain or IP or Proc Name) and Port and Protocol and Inbound Tag => Outbound Tag
resx.TbRuleOutboundTagTip: Can fill in the configuration remarks, please make sure it exist and are unique
resx.TbRuleTypeTips: You can set separate rules for Routing and DNS, or select "ALL" to apply to both
resx.TbSBFullConfigTemplateDesc: Add Outbound and Endpoint Config Only, Click to view the document
resx.TbSettingDnsImportDefConfig: Click to import default DNS config
resx.TbSettingsAutoUpdateInterval: Automatic update interval for Geo files (hours)
resx.TbSettingsBindInterfaceTip: For multi-interface environments, enter the name of the interface to bind. Only effective on Windows systems or TUN mode
resx.TbSettingsChinaUserTip: Users in China region can ignore this item
resx.TbSettingsCurrentFontFamilyLinuxTip: Install the font to the system, select or fill in the font name, restart the settings
resx.TbSettingsCurrentFontFamilyTip: Copy the font TTF/TTC file to the directory gui Fonts; Reopen the settings window
resx.TbSettingsCustomSystemProxyScriptPath: Custom system proxy script file path
resx.TbSettingsDefUserAgentTips: This parameter is valid only for raw/http, ws, gRPC and xhttp
resx.TbSettingsEnableAutoAdjustMainLvColWidth: Automatically adjust column width after subscription update
resx.TbSettingsEnableCacheFile4Sbox: Enable cache file for sing-box (ruleset files)
resx.TbSettingsEnableDragDropSort: Enable sorting Configurations by drag-n-drop (requires restart)
resx.TbSettingsExceptionTip: Exclusions: Do not use proxy server for addresses beginning with the following. Use semicolon (;) to separate entries.
resx.TbSettingsExceptionTip2: Exclusions: Do not use proxy server for the following addresses. Use comma (,) to separate entries.
resx.TbSettingsHide2TrayWhenClose: Hide to tray when closing the window
resx.TbSettingsHide2TrayWhenCloseTip: If the system does not have a tray function, please do not enable it
resx.TbSettingsLinuxSudoPasswordTip: The password will be validated via the command line. If a validation error causes the application to malfunction, please restart the application. The password will not be stored and must be entered again after each restart.
resx.TbSettingsMacOSShowInDock: macOS displays this in the Dock (requires restart)
resx.TbSettingsMixedConcurrencyCount: The number of concurrent tests during multi-test
resx.TbSettingsNotProxyLocalAddress: Do not use proxy servers for local (intranet) addresses
resx.TbSettingsSendThroughTip: For multi-interface environments, enter the local machine's IPv4 address
resx.TbSettingsStartBootTip: Set this with admin privileges, get admin privileges after startup
resx.TbValidateDirectExpectedIPsDesc: When configured, validates IPs returned for regional domains (e.g., geosite:cn - geoip:cn), returning only expected IPs
resx.TipDisplayLog: Please turn off when there is an abnormal disconnection
